headlines.title: Nearly three in four US scam victims report mental health harm, poll finds
headlines.snippet: A Gallup survey indicates that nearly three in four scam victims in the United States experienced mental health harm. In 2025, the financial impact of scams in the country was estimated to be $68 billion.

headlines.title: Two UK police officers face misconduct probe in Henry Nowak murder case
headlines.snippet: Two police officers in the UK are undergoing a misconduct investigation related to the murder case of Henryk Nowak. The Independent Office for Police Conduct is examining if race or religion played a role in the officers' actions.

headlines.title: Trump made $1.4B from crypto ventures in first year back in office
headlines.snippet: Donald Trump's financial disclosure for 2025 shows he earned over $1.4 billion from cryptocurrency ventures during his first year back in office.

headlines.snippet: Orange lava is flowing from Mount Etna.

headlines.title: Russian attacks kill three in Ukraine as Kyiv hits another oil refinery

headlines.title: ‘Board of Peace’ to launch ‘Hamas-free’ camps as Israel tightens grip on Gaza
headlines.snippet: The 'Board of Peace' is preparing to launch 'Hamas-free humanitarian zones' in Gaza, according to Israeli media reports. These zones are intended for displaced Palestinians and will be located in areas where Israel tightens its control.

headlines.title: Araghchi warns Israel against threatening Iran’s leader
headlines.snippet: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi issued a strong warning to Israel after Israel's Defence Minister Israel Katz made remarks about Iran’s Supreme Leader. Araghchi stated that Iran would retaliate if Israel acted against its master's orders.

headlines.title: ‘Board of Peace’ to launch ‘Hamas-free’ camps as Israel tightens grip on Gaza
headlines.snippet: The 'Board of Peace' plans to establish 'Hamas-free humanitarian zones' in Gaza as Israel increases its control over the territory. The first site is reportedly planned for Tel Sultan, near Rafah, and will house civilians without weapons or Hamas affiliation.

headlines.title: Israel threatens third attack on Iran despite diplomacy
headlines.snippet: Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz indicated that Israel might launch a third attack on Iran if deemed necessary, despite ongoing diplomatic efforts. Katz also stated that Israeli forces would occupy Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza indefinitely.

headlines.title: Israeli settler group calls for seizing crops in occupied Syrian land
headlines.snippet: An Israeli settler group has called for the seizure and sale of crops from occupied Syrian land in the Quneitra and Daraa regions. The group, Pioneers of Bashan, advocates for Israeli settlement in Syria.

headlines.snippet: The European Union Aviation Safety Agency is advising airlines to continue avoiding Iranian airspace.
